source.definition: a person who imparts knowledge or skills to others

explanation.sourceText: The English word "teacher" comes from the verb "to teach," which has Old English origins meaning 'to show, instruct, or guide.' The agent suffix "-er" denotes someone who performs the action.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „teacher” provine de la verbul „to teach”, care are origini în engleza veche și înseamnă „a arăta, a instrui sau a ghida”. Sufixul de agent „-er” indică persoana care realizează acțiunea.

source.additional: Teachers are key figures in education and play an important role in society.

target.definition: o persoană care transmite cunoștințe sau abilități

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word „învățător” is derived from the verb „a învăța” (from Old Church Slavonic „učiti”) with the agent suffix „-tor”.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „învățător” este format prin derivare de la verbul „a învăța” (din slavonă veche „učiti”) cu sufixul de agent „-tor”.

target.additional: „Învățător“ is commonly used for primary school teachers, while „profesor“ is used for teachers at higher education levels.

explanation.sourceText: The word refers to a person who instructs in an educational setting.
explanation.targetText: Se referă la o persoană care predă în educație.

explanation.sourceText: A teacher is also an educator who guides students.
explanation.targetText: Un învățător este și un educator care ghidează elevii.

examples.sourceText: As an educator, the teacher has an important role.
examples.targetText: Ca pedagog, învățătorul are un rol important.

examples.sourceText: Teachers often need to continue their education.
examples.targetText: Învățătorii trebuie să se perfecționeze frecvent.

examples.sourceText: The teacher explains the topic in detail.
Teachers are committed to their students.

learningTips.text: Remember that "teacher" and "învățător" both relate to learning—think of a teacher as your guide to new knowledge.
The Romanian word "învățător" contains "învață" which means "to learn"—this helps link the word to its meaning.
Imagine your teacher bringing you a new "learning adventure" every day—"învățător" is your Romanian companion on this journey!
When you think of a teacher, connect it with "învățare" (learning) to make the meaning clear and memorable.
